'''âth-ng-m''' ('''kathangam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voluptuate|voluptuate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voluptuate|voluptuate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kathangam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangam|thithangam]] || [[word:jithangam|jithangam]] || [[word:shithangam|shithangam]] || [[word:kithangam|kithangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangam|thuthuthangam]] || [[word:jujuthangam|jujuthangam]] || [[word:shushuthangam|shushuthangam]] || [[word:kukuthangam|kukuthangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthangam|thuthangam]] || [[word:juthangam|juthangam]] || [[word:shuthangam|shuthangam]] || [[word:kuthangam|kuthangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthangam|thuthangam]] || [[word:juthangam|juthangam]] || [[word:shuthangam|shuthangam]] || [[word:kuthangam|kuthangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethangam|thethangam]] || [[word:jethangam|jethangam]] || [[word:shethangam|shethangam]] || [[word:kethangam|kethangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothangam|thothothangam]] || [[word:jojothangam|jojothangam]] || [[word:shoshothangam|shoshothangam]] || [[word:kokothangam|kokothangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangam|thothangam]] || [[word:jothangam|jothangam]] || [[word:shothangam|shothangam]] || [[word:kothangam|kothangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangam|thothangam]] || [[word:jothangam|jothangam]] || [[word:shothangam|shothangam]] || [[word:kothangam|kothangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthangam|thĂŠthangam]] || [[word:jĂŠthangam|jĂŠthangam]] || [[word:shĂŠthangam|shĂŠthangam]] || [[word:kĂŠthangam|kĂŠthangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangam|thathathangam]] || [[word:jajathangam|jajathangam]] || [[word:shashathangam|shashathangam]] || [[word:kakathangam|kakathangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangam|thathangam]] || [[word:jathangam|jathangam]] || [[word:shathangam|shathangam]] || [[word:kathangam|kathangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangam|thathangam]] || [[word:jathangam|jathangam]] || [[word:shathangam|shathangam]] || [[word:kathangam|kathangam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathangam|shathangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathangam|goshathangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathangam|gokishathangam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathangamnĂŒ|shathangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathangamnknĂŒ|goshathangamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangamnĂŒ|gokishathangamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathangamshĂ«|shathangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathangamnkshĂ«|goshathangamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathangamshĂ«|gokishathangamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangamro|shathangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangamnkro|goshathangamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangamro|gokishathangamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangamu|shathangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangamnkmu|goshathangamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangamu|gokishathangamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathangamsher|shathangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathangamnksher|goshathangamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathangamsher|gokishathangamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathangamng|shathangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathangamnkng|goshathangamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathangamng|gokishathangamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathangamya|shathangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathangamnkya|goshathangamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathangamya|gokishathangamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathangamyam|shathangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathangamnkyam|goshathangamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathangamyam|gokishathangamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangamnĂŒshĂ«|shathangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathangamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathangamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangamnĂŒro|shathangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangamnknĂŒro|goshathangamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangamnĂŒro|gokishathangamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangamnĂŒmu|shathangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangamnknĂŒmu|goshathangamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangamnĂŒmu|gokishathangamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangamshĂ«nĂŒ|shathangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathangamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathangamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangamshĂ«ro|shathangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangamnkshĂ«ro|goshathangamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangamshĂ«ro|gokishathangamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangamshĂ«mu|shathangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangamnkshĂ«mu|goshathangamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangamshĂ«mu|gokishathangamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangamronĂŒ|shathangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangamnkronĂŒ|goshathangamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangamronĂŒ|gokishathangamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangamroshĂ«|shathangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangamnkroshĂ«|goshathangamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangamroshĂ«|gokishathangamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangamromu|shathangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangamnkromu|goshathangamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangamromu|gokishathangamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangamunĂŒ|shathangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangamnkmunĂŒ|goshathangamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangamunĂŒ|gokishathangamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangamushĂ«|shathangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangamnkmushĂ«|goshathangamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangamushĂ«|gokishathangamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangamuro|shathangamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangamnkmuro|goshathangamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangamuro|gokishathangamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
